title: Ovolyan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ovolyan''' were [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]]-sized [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] quadrupeds native to [[Laboi II]]. They were the favorite prey of the [[Laboi]], the fur-covered [[Snake/Legends|serpentine]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] who were the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] dominant [[Species/Legends|species]]. Interestingly enough, the Laboi were the favorite prey of the Ovolyan—but only the ones small enough for the [[Tooth/Legends|toothless]] ovolyans to swallow whole. Nevertheless, hunting ovolyans was a dangerous endeavor, with many Laboi [[Death/Legends|dying]] on the hunt despite their superior intelligence and pack-hunting tactics.
